name: collector reads PostToolUse hook logs to compute feedback loop time as a Performance metric
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/posttooluse && printf '{"tool":"Bash","started_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","finished_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:02Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/posttooluse/log.jsonl && printf '{"tool":"Bash","started_at":"2026-05-13T00:01:00Z","finished_at":"2026-05-13T00:01:04Z"}\n' >> .claude-tdd-pro/posttooluse/log.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric feedback-loop-time --since 1d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'feedback_loop_seconds_p50=3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
